name: Mitochondria Isolation by Differential Centrifugation
nameCn: 差速离心法分离线粒体

briefSteps.en: Collect tissue or cells on ice → mince and wash in isolation buffer → Dounce homogenize → remove debris at 600×g → pellet mitochondria at 7,000×g → wash pellet 2–3× → optional Percoll gradient purification → resuspend in assay buffer → verify integrity by JC-1 or cytochrome c oxidase activity → use within 4–6 h
briefSteps.zh: 冰上收集组织或细胞 → 切碎并用分离缓冲液清洗 → Dounce 匀浆 → 600×g 去除细胞碎片 → 7,000×g 沉淀线粒体 → 洗涤沉淀 2–3 次 → 可选 Percoll 梯度纯化 → 重悬于检测缓冲液 → JC-1 或细胞色素 c 氧化酶活性验证完整性 → 4–6 h 内使用

detailedSteps.en: Collect 0.5–2 g tissue (liver or heart) or ≥5×10⁷ cultured cells. Keep samples on ice at all times. Pre-chill all equipment: Dounce homogenizer, centrifuge tubes, rotors, and buffers. All steps must be performed at 4°C.
detailedSteps.zh: 收集 0.5–2 g 组织（肝脏或心脏）或 ≥5×10⁷ 培养细胞，全程冰上保存。预冷所有设备：Dounce 匀浆器、离心管、转头和缓冲液。所有步骤须在 4°C 进行。

detailedSteps.en: For tissue: mince with scissors into small pieces (<1 mm) in isolation buffer (250 mM sucrose, 10 mM HEPES pH 7.4, 1 mM EGTA, 0.1% BSA). Wash 3× with ice-cold buffer to remove blood and fat. Transfer to prechilled Dounce homogenizer with 5–10 mL buffer per gram tissue.
detailedSteps.zh: 组织：用剪刀切成小块（<1 mm），置于分离缓冲液（250 mM 蔗糖、10 mM HEPES pH 7.4、1 mM EGTA、0.1% BSA）中。冰冷缓冲液洗涤 3 次去除血液和脂肪。转入预冷 Dounce 匀浆器，每克组织加 5–10 mL 缓冲液。

detailedSteps.en: Homogenize with 10–15 strokes using the tight-fitting (type B) pestle with gentle, even pressure. Over-homogenization damages mitochondrial membranes. For cultured cells: use N₂ cavitation at 1,000 psi for 10 min at 4°C, or pass through 25G needle × 10 strokes.
detailedSteps.zh: 用紧配合（B 型）杵轻柔均匀推拉 10–15 次匀浆。过度匀浆损伤线粒体膜。培养细胞：氮气空化（1,000 psi，4°C 10 min），或 25G 注射针头推拉 10 次。

detailedSteps.en: Remove cell debris and unbroken cells: centrifuge at 600×g for 10 min at 4°C. Carefully transfer supernatant (post-nuclear supernatant, PNS) to a new tube. Discard pellet (nuclei and unbroken cells). Repeat if pellet is large.
detailedSteps.zh: 去除细胞碎片和未破碎细胞：600×g、4°C 离心 10 min。小心将上清（核后上清，PNS）转至新管。弃沉淀（细胞核和未破碎细胞）。沉淀较大时重复一次。

detailedSteps.en: Pellet crude mitochondria: centrifuge PNS at 7,000×g for 10 min at 4°C. The resulting supernatant is the cytoplasmic/ER fraction. Carefully discard supernatant without disturbing the reddish-brown mitochondrial pellet.
detailedSteps.zh: 沉淀粗线粒体：PNS 在 7,000×g、4°C 离心 10 min。上清为细胞质/内质网组分。小心去除上清，勿扰动红棕色线粒体沉淀。

detailedSteps.en: Wash mitochondria: gently resuspend pellet in 5 mL isolation buffer and centrifuge again at 7,000×g for 10 min at 4°C. Repeat 2–3 times until the pellet is tighter and the supernatant is clear (removes myoglobin, cytochrome c, and ER contamination).
detailedSteps.zh: 洗涤线粒体：轻柔重悬沉淀于 5 mL 分离缓冲液，再次 7,000×g、4°C 离心 10 min。重复 2–3 次直至沉淀更紧实且上清澄清（去除肌红蛋白、细胞色素 c 和内质网污染）。

detailedSteps.en: Optional Percoll gradient purification for higher purity: layer sample over 18%/30% discontinuous Percoll gradient in isolation buffer. Centrifuge at 95,000×g for 30 min at 4°C (SW-41 Ti rotor). Mitochondria band at 18/30% interface. Collect band, dilute 1:5 in buffer, wash by centrifugation at 6,000×g × 10 min (×2).
detailedSteps.zh: 可选 Percoll 梯度纯化（提高纯度）：将样品铺于 18%/30% 不连续 Percoll 梯度（分离缓冲液配制）上。95,000×g、4°C 离心 30 min（SW-41 Ti 转头）。线粒体聚集在 18/30% 界面。收集条带，1:5 稀释后 6,000×g × 10 min 洗涤 2 次。

detailedSteps.en: Resuspend final mitochondrial pellet in assay buffer (250 mM sucrose, 10 mM HEPES pH 7.4, 1 mM EGTA; omit BSA for functional assays). Quantify protein by BCA assay. Typical yield: 1–10 mg/mL protein.
detailedSteps.zh: 将最终线粒体沉淀重悬于检测缓冲液（250 mM 蔗糖、10 mM HEPES pH 7.4、1 mM EGTA；功能实验不加 BSA）。BCA 法定量蛋白。典型产量：1–10 mg/mL 蛋白。

detailedSteps.en: Assess mitochondrial integrity and function: stain with JC-1 (healthy: red aggregates at >590 nm; depolarized: green monomers at 529 nm) or measure cytochrome c oxidase activity ± detergent. Alternatively, measure oxygen consumption rate (OCR) using Seahorse XF analyzer or Clark electrode. Use isolated mitochondria within 4–6 h.
detailedSteps.zh: 评估线粒体完整性和功能：JC-1 染色（健康：>590 nm 红色聚集体；去极化：529 nm 绿色单体）或 ± 去污剂测细胞色素 c 氧化酶活性。也可用 Seahorse XF 仪或 Clark 电极测氧耗速率（OCR）。分离后 4–6 h 内使用。

note.en: Washed mitochondrial pellet can be snap-frozen in liquid N₂ and stored at −80°C in isolation buffer for up to 1 month. Note: freeze-thaw disrupts inner membrane integrity; do not use frozen mitochondria for functional assays.
note.zh: 洗涤后的线粒体沉淀可液氮速冻后 −80°C 储存最多 1 个月。注意：冻融破坏内膜完整性，冷冻线粒体不可用于功能性实验。

components.name: 1. Collect tissue (0.5–2 g liver/heart) or cells (≥5×10⁷); keep ice-cold

note.en: All steps at 4°C. Pre-chill all tools, buffers, centrifuge rotors.
note.zh: 全程 4°C 操作。预冷所有工具、缓冲液、离心转头。

note.en: Transfer to Dounce homogenizer, 5–10 mL buffer/g tissue.
note.zh: 转入 Dounce 匀浆器，每克组织加 5–10 mL 缓冲液。

note.en: Gentle, even pressure. Over-homogenization destroys mitochondria. Cells: N₂ cavitation (1,000 psi, 10 min, 4°C) or 25G syringe needle × 10 strokes.
note.zh: 轻柔均匀推拉。过度匀浆破坏线粒体。细胞：氮气空化（1,000 psi，10 min，4°C）或 25G 针头 × 10 次。

note.en: Keep supernatant (PNS). Discard pellet (nuclei, unbroken cells). Repeat if pellet is large.
note.zh: 保留上清（PNS）。弃沉淀（核、未破碎细胞）。沉淀大时重复一次。

note.en: Supernatant = cytoplasmic fraction. Pellet = crude mitochondria.
note.zh: 上清 = 细胞质组分。沉淀 = 粗线粒体。

components.name: 6. Wash: resuspend pellet in 5 mL buffer; repeat 7,000×g spin (×2–3)

note.en: Pellet becomes tighter and less brownish with each wash.
note.zh: 每次洗涤后沉淀更紧实、颜色更浅（去除肌红蛋白和细胞色素 c）。

components.name: 7. Optional: Percoll gradient for pure mitochondria

note.en: 18%/30% Percoll gradient in buffer. 95,000×g 30 min 4°C (SW-41 Ti). Mitochondria at 18/30% interface. Wash 2× at 6,000×g 10 min.
note.zh: 18%/30% Percoll 梯度（缓冲液配制）。95,000×g 30 min 4°C（SW-41 Ti 转头）。线粒体在 18/30% 界面。6,000×g 洗 2 次。

components.name: 8. Resuspend in assay buffer (without BSA for functional assays); quantify by BCA

note.en: 1–10 mg/mL protein. Integrity: cytochrome c oxidase activity ± detergent.
note.zh: 蛋白浓度 1–10 mg/mL。完整性验证：细胞色素 c 氧化酶活性（± 去污剂）。

components.name: 9. Functional integrity check: OCR (Seahorse/Clark electrode) or JC-1/TMRM

note.en: Healthy mito: JC-1 red aggregates; depolarized: green monomers. Use within 4–6 h of isolation.
note.zh: 健康线粒体：JC-1 红色聚集体；去极化：绿色单体。分离后 4–6 h 内使用。

notes.en: Differential centrifugation gives ~70% pure mitochondria. For functional studies, Percoll gradient recommended. Keep at 4°C; use within 4–6 h. WB markers: VDAC/TOMM20 (outer membrane), HSP60 (matrix), cytochrome c (IMS).
notes.zh: 差速离心纯度约 70%。功能性实验推荐 Percoll 梯度纯化。4°C 保存，4–6 h 内使用。WB 标记：VDAC/TOMM20（外膜）、HSP60（基质）、细胞色素 c（膜间隙）。

ref: Frezza et al. (2007) Nat Protoc 2:287–295; Wieckowski et al. (2009) Nat Protoc 4:1582–1590

materials.name: Cells or tissue (>10⁸ cells or >0.5 g tissue)

usage.en: Isolate intact mitochondria from cells or tissues by differential centrifugation.
usage.zh: 差速离心从细胞或组织中分离完整线粒体。
